name: @cognee/pipeline
description: Node.js bindings for the cognee-core pipeline engine

scripts.build:rust: cd cognee-neon && cargo build --release && cd .. && node scripts/copy-artifact.js release
scripts.build:rust:debug: cd cognee-neon && cargo build && cd .. && node scripts/copy-artifact.js debug
scripts.build: npm run build:rust && npm run build:ts
